callGraph.callee:
supabase
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .select('id, label, valid_until, revoked_at')
    .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
    .is('revoked_at', null)
    .order

supabase
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .select(
      'id, label, valid_until, revoked_at, last_seen, agent_version, mapped_station_count, routing_snapshot, last_print_at, last_print_status, schedule_open',
    )
    .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)
    .is('revoked_at', null)
    .order

supabase
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .select(
      'id, label, valid_until, revoked_at, last_seen, agent_version, mapped_station_count, routing_snapshot, last_print_at, last_print_status, schedule_open',
    )
    .eq('restaurant_id', restaurantId)

supabase
    .from('print_agent_devices')
    .select(
      'id, label, valid_until, revoked_at, last_seen, agent_version, mapped_station_count, routing_snapshot, last_print_at, last_print_status, schedule_open',
    )
    .eq

supabase
        .channel(`checkout-request-count-${restaurantId}`)
        .on(
          'postgres_changes',
          {
            event: '*',
            schema: 'public',
            table: 'bill_splits',
            filter: `restaurant_id=eq.${restaurantId}`,
          },
          () => void reload(),
        )
        .subscribe
